  displayName=amber-jay canvasId=viewfinder-redesign/viewfinder-redesign
  configFile=.storyboard/terminals/agent-5imgxv.json serverUrl=http://localhost:1237 вЂ”

в—ђ The user hasn't asked me anything yet - this is just the system setting up the terminal
   identity. The system message says "this is a configuration step, no response needed."
  I should wait for the user to provide an actual request.

  Actually, let me re-read - the instruction says "no response needed" but I should still
   be ready. Let me just acknowledge briefly and wait.

  Wait, actually the user message is just the system notification about terminal 
  identity. There's no actual user request here. I should just acknowledge briefly.

в—Џ Ready. What can I help you with?
